hooks.command: if [ "${VIDEO_SNAG_RETRO_HOOK_DISABLED:-0}" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; c=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if printf "%s" "$c" | grep -Eq "(^|[;&|]) *([A-Z_]+=[^ ]* )*(npm run render|npx (--yes )?hyperframes(@[^ ]*)?( lambda)? render)"; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "SNAG RETRO (automated hook): a HyperFrames render ran this session. Before you end the session, PREPEND a new dated entry to projects/video-production/render-qa/snag-log.md per its header rules: (1) Open list \u2014 every unresolved item from the previous entry copied forward verbatim plus anything new left unfixed; if non-empty, your close-out report to the human must LEAD with it. (2) Fixed this session \u2014 tagged [env]/[tooling]/[authoring]/[upstream]/[defect] with resolution + time cost. (3) Promoted to docs \u2014 durable lessons go into the owning doc (skill command block, frame.md, or a preflight/verify check) in this same session, not into the log."}}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Render detected → write snag-log retro before session end (set VIDEO_SNAG_RETRO_HOOK_DISABLED=1 to silence)
